description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% polyester, engineered with Climalite technology, has a high collar neck, long raglan sleeves with flourescent green adidas patented 3-Stripes on the shoulders and sleeves, full length metal zipper in the front, and two insert pockets with metal zippers and applique brand name on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 30 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron; but do not iron on print/trims/logosEmbrace the winter fun this year in this trendy black jacket from adidas. The patented 3-Stripes in fluorescent green enhance your sporty look, and the full length zipper keeps the elements at bay. Layer this jacket over a T-shirt, jeans and sneakers.Model statistics The model wears size M in jackets Height: 6', Shoulders: 18"
